name: 3DBenchy - The jolly 3D printing calibration boat
creator: CreativeTools
description: 3DBenchy is a 3D model specifically designed for testing and benchmarking 3D printers. It features multiple challenging details such as overhangs, bridges, round holes, thin tubes, and flat surfaces.

name: XYZ 20mm Calibration Cube
creator: iRacer
description: A simple XYZ 20mm calibration cube to test your printer's dimensional accuracy. It has letters X, Y, and Z indented on the faces.

name: Universal Filament Spool Holder
creator: BambuCustoms
description: An upgraded heavy-duty spool holder designed for the side panel of the Bambu Lab X1C. Offers low-friction rotational guide bearings.
